title: Cobblemon Interface [Exposure]
description: Exposure GUI in Cobblemon Interface style.
body:
This resource pack changes the default interface of the [Exposure](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure) mod, giving it style and atmosphere Cobblemon Interface.

🎨 All original ideas and visual style of Cobblemon Interface belong to [VinnyStalck](https://modrinth.com/user/VinnyStalck).

📷 Exposure mod created by [mortuusars](https://modrinth.com/user/mortuusars).

### Important

Support for this resource pack will cease if [Cobblemon Interface Modded](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cobblemon-interface-modded) starts supporting the Exposure mod.
